entity.summary: Open cross-chain intent protocol connecting users with independent solvers for peer-to-peer on-chain swaps across multiple blockchains.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0393. Official developer documentation describes Bron Intents as an open protocol for swaps across blockchains and explicitly states that Bron is not a trading venue, broker, counterparty, or controller of user funds. HEI uses a cross-chain ecosystem origin rather than a legal-country assignment.

events.title: Bron Intents recorded as cross-chain swap protocol
events.description: Bron Intents is recorded as an open cross-chain intent protocol for peer-to-peer on-chain swaps executed through independent solvers and verified settlement.
events.notes: The record models the protocol-level swap system rather than treating Bron as a custodial exchange or counterparty.

evidence.title: Bron official website
evidence.notes: Official domain used to verify Bron identity and its cross-chain swap feature.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bron Intents
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0393.

evidence.title: Bron Intents — open protocol for cross-chain swaps
evidence.notes: Official developer documentation defines Bron Intents as an open cross-chain swap protocol using independent solvers and on-chain settlement, and states that Bron is not the trading counterparty.
